name_cn:
💰
Top-tier original, code-changed chip M13014
This CarryAll BB Handbag is crafted from Monogram canvas, adorned with eye-catching chain embellishments and Monogram flowers, lighting up day and night with a trendy look. The leather brand and drawstring closure complement each other, while a zippered interior pocket offers convenient access for daily use.
17 x 10 x 26 cm
(H x W x D)
Monogram coated canvas
Calfskin trim
Fabric lining
Hardware
Drawstring and magnetic snap closure
Zippered interior pocket
Branding
Fits smartphone, keys, Zippy wallet, and headphones
Strap: non-detachable, adjustable
Strap half-length: 40.0 cm
Strap half-length adjustable to: 50.0 cm
Handle: single handle, detachable
